name: Chutney Cheese Spread
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons dry sherry, more if needed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except green onions and chutney in a food processor.
2. Blend thoroughly until a smooth mixture is formed.
3. Spread the mixture evenly into a 8-inch quiche or tart pan.
4. Top with chutney and chopped green onions.
5. Serve with crackers.
